summary: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building high-performance backend services, blockchain infrastructure and distributed systems. Strong expertise in Scala, backend architecture, PostgreSQL optimization, API design and CI/CD workflows. Passionate about simple, maintainable solutions and clean software design, with a proven ability to quickly adapt to new technologies, domains, and challenges.

experience.description: Designed and developed backend services, APIs, and blockchain infrastructure powering the Alephium ecosystem. Optimized systems processing over 100 million blockchain records, delivering low-latency and reliable access to data for users, wallets, explorers, and applications.

experience.role: Progressed from Intern to Senior Scala Engineer
experience.description: Developed and scaled cloud-based software for the operation and optimization of autonomous vehicle fleets, contributing to backend architecture, distributed systems, and real-time data processing.

education.institution: EPFL - Swiss Federal Institute of Technology Lausanne
